articles.title: Italy bans Kanye West and Travis Scott concerts after 'concerns' from the Jewish community
articles.excerpt: In recent months Kanye has been forced to apologise to the Jewish community after making a string of anti-Semitic remarks.
articles.content:
Kanye West has been banned from performing in Italy, following a request from the local Jewish community to cancel the gig
The rapper had been due to perform in the northern city of Reggio Emilia in…
articles.author: Rebecca Lawrence

articles.title: Centre moves two CoBRA battalions to Manipur
articles.excerpt: The Centre has ordered the deployment of two elite CRPF CoBRA battalions to Manipur. These specialized jungle warfare units will undertake operations against armed groups fueling violence. This move aims to restore lasting peace in the state. The commandos ar…
